allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Add animated hero background with perspective grid and Airtable portfolio integration

- Add HeroBackground component with perspective 3D grid and GSAP animations
- Integrate Airtable for dynamic portfolio images management
- Add PortfolioShowcase carousel component with infinite scroll
- Improve text legibility in hero section for both themes
- Add smooth transitions between sections

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: Add gsap dependency for hero background animations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git -C "D:\\Tools\\zakra-auto-model" add App.tsx components/PortfolioShowcase.tsx hooks/usePortfolioImages.ts services/geminiService.ts utils/imageOptimizer.ts)

Bash(git -C "D:\\Tools\\zakra-auto-model" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: Gemini API resolution params and optimize portfolio carousel

- Fix responseModalities to use uppercase [''TEXT'', ''IMAGE''] per Gemini docs
- Add all supported aspect ratios for Gemini 3 Pro Image
- Add in-memory cache \(5min TTL\) for portfolio images
- Add image preloading for first 6 carousel images
- Add skeleton loading state while images preload
- Use eager loading and high fetchPriority for visible images
- Add optimizeImageForCarouselFast\(\) for faster preloading

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "D:\\Tools\\zakra-auto-model" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: Update API quota error message to be user-friendly

- Change error title from "API Limit Reached" to "High Demand"
- Update message to indicate we''re working on it instead of asking user to fix it
- Remove confusing "Go to Settings" instruction for end users

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "D:\\Tools\\zakra-auto-model" commit -m "refactor: New high-margin pricing structure

New Plans:
- Free: $0 / 3 credits \(trial\)
- Starter: $29 / 50 credits \(83% margin\)
- Creator: $59 / 120 credits \(80% margin\)
- Pro: $99 / 250 credits \(75% margin\)
- Studio: $199 / 600 credits \(70% margin\)

Changes:
- Updated all plan references \(basic->starter, premium->studio\)
- Updated resolution restrictions \(Free/Starter = 1K max\)
- Updated database schemas and SQL scripts
- Removed all unlimited credit references

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>")
